Adds a Vitest regression case for repairing a stale Telegram direct session route from `openai-codex` to `openai` while preserving canonical OpenAI auth pins and clearing stale Codex runtime pins.

PR surface: Tests +39. Total +39 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this review. Source inspection shows the helper path and the PR body reports a synthetic behavior check, but there is no real upgraded Telegram/Codex session-store proof.
